links.description: Largest trade partner; automotive manufacturing hub for German OEMs
EU member since 2004; frequent disputes over rule of law and frozen funds
Heavy reliance on Russian gas via TurkStream; Paks nuclear expansion by Rosatom
Growing Chinese investment; BYD and CATL factories; Belt and Road participant
